Supm3n Shared Components

This directory contains shared components, styles, and scripts used across Supm3n projects.

Note: This directory is not meant to be browsed directly. Components are loaded dynamically by projects using the Supm3nComponents loader.

Available Resources

Components

  • /shared/components/header.html - Navigation header
  • /shared/components/footer.html - Footer
  • /shared/components/breadcrumbs.html - Breadcrumb navigation

Styles

  • /shared/styles/variables.css - CSS variables (colors, typography, spacing)
  • /shared/styles/components.css - Component styles

Scripts

  • /shared/scripts/components.js - Component loader
  • /shared/scripts/theme.js - Theme toggle functionality
  • /shared/scripts/breadcrumbs.js - Breadcrumb generation
  • /shared/scripts/utils.js - Utility functions

Usage

Projects load these components using the component loader:

<script src="https://supm3n.com/shared/scripts/components.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {
    await Supm3nComponents.init({
      header: true,
      footer: true,
      breadcrumbs: true,
      styles: true,
      utils: true
    });
  });
</script>
